name: Plaid
description: Connect personal bank accounts through Plaid, list accounts and balances, and sync transactions.

secrets.name: PLAID_CLIENT_ID
secrets.label: Plaid Client ID
secrets.description: Client ID from the Plaid dashboard.

secrets.name: PLAID_SECRET
secrets.label: Plaid Secret
secrets.description: Sandbox or Production secret from the Plaid dashboard.

secrets.name: PLAID_ENV
secrets.label: Plaid Environment
secrets.description: Plaid environment: sandbox, development, or production. Defaults to sandbox.

secrets.name: PLAID_TOKEN_STORE_PATH
secrets.label: Plaid Token Store Path
secrets.description: Optional local path for encrypted-by-filesystem access token storage. Defaults to ~/.plaid/tokens.json.
